column.name: MANDT
column.description: Client identifier in the SAP system (e.g., 100, 200). Used to separate data belonging to different corporate entities or environments.

column.name: OBKNR
column.description: Primary key of the object record – a unique alphanumeric identifier for the business object (e.g., equipment, functional location). Analysts use it to join with related tables.

column.name: OBZAE
column.description: Object status code indicating the current lifecycle phase (e.g., 'A' for active, 'I' for inactive). Helps filter objects by operational status.

column.name: EQUNR
column.description: Equipment number assigned by SAP Plant Maintenance. Typical values are numeric strings like '00012345' and are used to track individual pieces of equipment.

column.name: IHNUM
column.description: Technical identification number for the installation hierarchy (often a functional location). Allows grouping of equipment under a common location.

column.name: BAUTL
column.description: Business area or utility code that classifies the object by functional domain (e.g., 'ELEC' for electrical). Used for reporting across business segments.

column.name: ILOAN
column.description: Indicator flag showing whether the object is on loan or temporarily assigned (e.g., 'X' for yes, blank for no). Important for asset availability analysis.

column.name: SORTF
column.description: User‑defined sort field that determines the display order of objects in SAP screens. Analysts can sort reports using this column for custom sequencing.

column.name: BEARB
column.description: User ID of the person who last processed or changed the record. Typical values are SAP usernames like 'JSMITH'. Useful for audit trails.

column.name: OBJVW
column.description: Object view type that specifies the perspective of the data (e.g., 'E' for equipment view, 'F' for functional location view). Determines which attributes are relevant for the row.

column.name: SERNR
column.description: Serial number of the equipment, often supplied by the manufacturer. Appears as a mixed alphanumeric string such as 'SN12345' and is key for warranty tracking.

column.name: MATNR
column.description: Material number linked to the object, referencing the SAP material master (e.g., '40000123'). Enables cost and inventory analysis tied to the object.

column.name: DATUM
column.description: Date field (YYYYMMDD) indicating the reference date for the record, such as creation or last status change. Analysts use it for time‑based reporting.

column.name: EQSNR
column.description: Equipment serial number used internally by SAP for unique identification when multiple serial numbers exist. Usually a numeric sequence.

column.name: TASER
column.description: Technical attribute set identifier that groups objects with similar technical characteristics. Helps in bulk maintenance planning.

column.name: UII
column.description: Unique Item Identifier – a globally unique reference (often a GUID) for the object, used in integration scenarios and external systems.

column.name: EAM_BADI_FLAG
column.description: Boolean flag (e.g., 'X' or blank) indicating whether a custom BADI (Business Add‑In) has been applied to the object. Useful for tracing custom logic execution.
